designSystem.style: Dark organic dashboard — deep forest-green backgrounds with vivid green primary accents, warm orange urgency indicators, and yellow highlights. Card-based layout with subtle borders and soft glow effects. High-contrast typography with clear urgency hierarchy. Earthy, sustainability-forward palette that feels alive without being harsh.

screens: Home / Rescue Queue — urgent consume-first checklist, quick stats, best rescue recipe suggestion, scan CTA
Pantry — full inventory list with freshness bars, expiry urgency color coding, category filters, search
Rescue Meals — recipe cards ranked by urgency, ingredient tags, step-by-step modal with cook confirmation
Sharing Board — offer surplus food, claim neighbor listings, donation pickup scheduling
Impact Dashboard — money/meals/CO2 saved stats by week/month/all-time, streak, rank progression
